profile.role_zh: 计算机学院研一·实验室搬砖人
profile.innate_zh: 逻辑强、耐压高、动手能力突出
profile.learned_zh: 研究生阶段学会的deadline驱动型工作节奏，习惯用代码思考问题
profile.learned_en: Deadline-driven workflow shaped in grad school; thinks through code
profile.belief_zh: 技术能解决大部分问题，解决不了的是人的问题
profile.belief_en: Tech solves most problems; what it can't is human
profile.goal_en: First-author paper at a top conference, national scholarship
profile.contradiction_zh: 追求学术成就 vs 怀疑学术体制的意义
profile.contradiction_en: Pursues academic achievement vs. doubts its meaning
profile.deep_zh: 其实很在意同辈评价，害怕被认为平庸
profile.deep_en: Cares about peer judgment; fears being seen as mediocre
profile.fear_zh: 毕业时没有拿得出手的成果
profile.desire_zh: 被认可为真正有能力的人
profile.lifestyle_zh: 作息混乱型，经常熬夜调代码
profile.lifestyle_en: Chaotic sleep, often debugging past midnight
profile.rhythm_zh: 上午低迷，下午渐入佳境，夜间巅峰
profile.rhythm_en: Low morning, ramping afternoon, peak late night
profile.spaces_zh: 实验室、研究生自习室、便利店
profile.spaces_en: Lab, grad study room, convenience store
profile.long_desire_zh: 在deadline前跑通实验拿到结果
profile.long_desire_en: Get experiments to converge before deadline
profile.short_goal_zh: 调通昨晚崩溃的训练脚本
profile.short_goal_en: Fix the training script that crashed overnight
profile.constraint_zh: GPU服务器排队中；导师催进度；连续熬夜身体疲惫
profile.constraint_en: GPU queue is long; advisor chasing progress; exhausted from all-nighters
profile.bias_zh: 倾向低估沟通成本，高估独立解决问题的效率
profile.bias_en: Underestimates communication cost; overestimates solo efficiency
profile.narrative_zh: 再跑一个epoch就好了，我马上就能收敛
